description_long: This rifle features a streamlined, angular body with a prominent, elongated barrel extending from a robust receiver. The rear section is wide and tapers forward, with two large, rounded structures on either side, likely housing internal mechanisms or serving as mounting points. The central body is detailed with various geometric cutouts and indents, suggesting a modern, possibly futuristic design. The underside appears to have a magazine well or grip area, while the top is relatively flat, possibly for mounting optics. The overall finish is metallic gray, giving it a utilitarian and durable appearance. The rifle's proportions and detailing indicate it is designed for both functionality and visual impact in an urban environment.
description: A sleek, angular rifle with a long barrel, wide rear section, and metallic gray finish, featuring modern geometric detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the elongated barrel and wide, angular rear section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the twin rounded structures and the central barrel opening, emphasizing the rifle's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible cutouts and detailing along the body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wide stock area and the symmetry of the twin rounded structures.
